name: io.github.bolnet/memwright
title: Memwright
description: Embedded memory for AI agents. SQLite + FTS5 full-text search, pgvector semantic search, and Neo4j entity graphs with multi-layer retrieval fusion.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key for embeddings (required for semantic search)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings (alternative to OpenRouter)
